characters.name: Ben Sheffield
characters.description: Ben SheffieldBiographyFull NameBenjamin SheffieldAliasesBen(by everyone)StatusSingleRomancesHolly Tyler(ex-girlfriend)ResidenceBritainBen Sheffield(portrayed by David de Lautour) is Holly's British boyfriend for most of the third season. The two met in England when he was performing his music in a pub where Holly traveled during her summer in Paris where she was working to be a tour guide. Sparks flew and soon after, Ben joined Holly on a flight to New York. When Henry and Vince saw Holly kissing Ben at the airport, they are nevertheless shocked that Holly has moved on while they were in New York waiting for her to return. While Henry manages to part amicably with Holly, Vince remains jealous and unhappy that Holly has chosen to be with someone else entirely. To further strain matters, Holly manages to convince Gary and Vince to reluctantly allow Ben to live with them in their apartment. Much to Ben and Holly's obliviousness, Vince encourages Holly to break up with Ben frequently, though with no success. Ben and Holly break up after only six months together after Holly accidentally says "I love you too, Vince" instead of "I love you too, Ben." After the breakup, he writes a song about their breakup called "Holly Tyler Sucks" which Holly wasn't fond of. The two managed to remain friends despite their breakup and he continues to live in Vince and Gary's apartment. Ben disappears after the third season. According to Gary, he was out for the summer, but he never returned. It is presumed he went back to Britain.

characters.name: Charlie
characters.description: CharlieBiographyFull NameCharlesAliasesCharlieSeries InformationPortrayed byJason PriestleyCharlieis a stalker who goes out with Val when Val is trying to convince Vic that their marriage means nothing, though Charlie's presence actually ends up deepening Val's feelings for Vic. After telling him that she and Vic are siblings, Charlie proposes on the first day they meet. She eventually gets rid of Charlie when she tells him that she and Vic are married.

characters.name: Danielle Johnson
characters.description: Danielle JohnsonBiographyFull NameDanielle JohnsonAliasesDani(by friends)GenderFemaleSeries InformationPortrayed byTamyra GrayDanielle Johnsonis a dance major at NYU who is friends with Tina and starts dating Gary. After hearing Danielle sing Tina Turner's "Proud Mary," Holly decides to become a talent manager with Danielle as her first client and fashions her as "Danielle Dulay". However, Danielle is signed by a major label instead, to Holly's joy and disappointment. She breaks up with Gary after choosing to focus on more on her career.

characters.name: Gary Thorpe
characters.description: Gary ThorpeBiographyFull NameGary Johann ThorpeAliasesGary(by everyone)StatusIn a relationship withTina HavenGenderMaleRelativesOlivia(mother)RomancesTina(girlfriend)Jill(ex-girlfriend)OccupationStudentSeries InformationSeasons1•2•3•4Episodes86First"The Pilot"Last"Finally..."Portrayed byWesley JonathanGary Thorpeis a main character inthe WBsitcomWhat I Like About You. He isHolly Tyler's best friend, and eventually becomes best friends and roommates withVince. He has a close relationship with his mother. Initially portrayed somewhat of a plain-clothes and dim-witted nerd, even having unusual conspiracy theories such as the pyramids being spaceships and that Stonehenge was one rock with lots of mirrors, Gary is known for being devoted to his friends and providing surprisingly, though bluntly delivered, insightful advice. Throughout the series, he becomes cooler and, like Holly, a more mature and capable individual. Aside from Holly and Val, Gary is the only other character to appear in all seasons of the show. Gary goes through several jobs in the series, the first being an employee at a copy store where he finds Holly a job. Subsequently, Gary finds work as a salesperson at a clothing store and is eventually hired as a employee at Val and Lauren's bakery. Because of his business major and dedication to his job, Val promotes him to become the bakery's manager, much to Lauren's ire.

characters.name: Gary Thorpe
characters.description: Gary ThorpeBiographyFull NameGary Johann ThorpeAliasesGary(by everyone)StatusIn a relationship withTina HavenGenderMaleRelativesOlivia(mother)RomancesTina(girlfriend)Jill(ex-girlfriend)OccupationStudentSeries InformationSeasons1•2•3•4Episodes86First"The Pilot"Last"Finally..."Portrayed byWesley JonathanGary Thorpeis a main character inthe WBsitcomWhat I Like About You. Because of his business major and dedication to his job, Val promotes him to become the bakery's manager, much to Lauren's ire.

characters.name: Henry Gibson
characters.description: Henry GibsonBiographyStatusSingleGenderMaleRelativesDr. Noah (Older brother)RomancesHolly Tyler(ex-girlfriend)Series InformationPortrayed byMichael McMillian Henry Gibsonis Holly's first love and first boyfriend. He becomes friends with Gary and Vince and is known to be a likeable, insightful, and intelligent person. While he is socially awkward and shy at first, he gradually becomes more assertive and confident, especially through his relationship with Holly. Holly and Val first meet Henry in a men's bathroom at B-91 during a girls' night out where Val, playing wingman for Holly to attract a guy, is kissed by Holly's intended target. Distraught, Holly tries to escape Val in the men's bathroom only for Val to follow her in there. There, Henry almost uses the bathroom in front of them as Holly and Val are talking.

characters.name: Henry Gibson
characters.description: Henry GibsonBiographyStatusSingleGenderMaleRelativesDr. Noah (Older brother)RomancesHolly Tyler(ex-girlfriend)Series InformationPortrayed byMichael McMillian Henry Gibsonis Holly's first love and first boyfriend. characters.name: Holly Tyler
characters.description: Holly TylerBiographyFull NameHolly Anne TylerAliasesHolly(by everyone)BirthShe is born in 1986 and she is 18 and end of seasons she is 20sStatusIn a relationship withVinceGenderFemaleRelativesUnnamed fatherValerie Tyler(older sister/guardian)RomancesVince(boyfriend)Ben Sheffield(ex-boyfriend)Henry Gibson(ex-boyfriend)OccupationStudentSeries InformationSeasons1•2•3•4Episodes86First"The Pilot"Last"Finally..."Portrayed byAmanda BynesHolly Tyleris one of the main characters inthe WBsitcomWhat I Like About You. She is the younger sister ofValerie Tylerand is best friends withGary ThorpeandTina Haven. She is portrayed byAmanda Bynes. Valerie Tyler(older sister/guardian) Holly grew up with her older sisterValerie, being raised by a single father. She is a high-spirited and impulsive teenager who lives with her older sister Val in New York City. Despite her attempts to be a good roommate, her unpredictable behavior turns Val's life upside down. Holly has a habit of causing chaos wherever she goes, but she keeps a positive outlook through it all. It also helps that she has a responsible big sister, and great friends likeGary ThorpeandTina Haven, around to keep things under control.

characters.name: Jack Tyler
characters.description: Jack TylerBiographyFull NameJack TylerAliasesJack(by everyone)Jack Tyler(portrayed by Barry Bostwick; in "Pilot", Mr. Tyler was played by Peter Scolari) is Holly and Val's father who moves to Japan, leaving Holly in the care of Val. His wife died at some point, but he loved her dearly and regards her as his soulmate. When he returns to visit his daughters three years after moving to Japan, he reveals that he is gay and in a relationship with Toshi Yamamora (portrayed by Kipp Shiotani), a Japanese restaurateur and Jack's business partner. After learning that Val has married Vic, he encourages her not to annul her marriage because she fears getting her heart broken again since he can see that she and Vic do love one another. As an ongoing joke, when Jack sees Vince he calls him either Henry or Ben.

characters.name: Jeff Campbell
characters.description: Jeff CampbellJeff Campbell(portrayed bySimon Rex) isVal's first boyfriend in the series and the manager of his father's restaurant. He eventually becomes the manager of the restaurantB-91, whereHolly,GaryandHenryhung out at near the end of the first season. As well as supporting Val, he frequently helps Holly and Gary, often with a more relaxed attitude than Val. Jeff and Val share a relatively stable and happy relationship for a year until he reveals his feelings about marriage to Val after a date onValentine's Day, which Val (thanks to Holly) mistakenly thought that Jeff was going to propose to her. However, Jeff reveals that he never wants to get married, upsetting Val. The two break up, which emotionally damages Val for a long time. However, after Val explains to Holly why it is important to wait until she's emotionally ready to have sex and that "sex is not a game", Val and Jeff sleep together, which Holly saw as being hypocritical. Val decides it would be best that they do not see each other anymore until they could "do it without doing it." After thefirst season, he never appears in any more episodes and is scarcely mentioned.

characters.name: Jeff Campbell

characters.name: Jill
characters.description: Jill(portrayed by Anicka Haywood) is Gary's girlfriend, whom he initially met when he saved her boss, a billionaire, from choking. In order to break up with Gary, she lies about going to Paris, which Holly discovers on Gary's birthday. Gary eventually confronts her with the truth and forgives Holly for not telling him immediately. Gary Thorpe's first serious girlfriend is Jill, the assistant to a millionaire businessman. The two date for a year, only for Jill to leave for Paris; Gary later learns that she lied about Paris just to break up with him. Portrayed byAnicka Haywood.

characters.name: Kate
characters.description: KateBiographyStatusSingleGenderFemaleSeries InformationPortrayed byDanneel HarrisKateis Henry's girlfriend after he breaks up with Holly and moves on. They originally met as students applying for Princeton. Throughout Henry's relationship with Kate, Holly constantly worried if Henry had genuinely moved on despite initially encouraging the relationship so that Holly could pursue Vince. Kate and Henry break up when she questions if he still has feelings for Holly, which he realized he did.

characters.name: Lauren
characters.description: LaurenBiographyFull NameLaurenAliasesLaurenStatusdatingMarcusGenderfemaleRelativesValerie Tyler(best friend\sister figure)RomancesMarcus(boyfriend)Occupationco-Manager of bakery withValerie TylerSeries InformationSeasonsseason 1 to season 4EpisodesunknownLaurenis one of the main characters in all four seasons ofthe WBsitcomWhat I Like About You. She is portrayed byLeslie Grossman. and he is best friend ofvaland she is girlfriend ofMarcus Lauren is Val's best friend and frequent business partner. Her relationship with the Tyler sisters is generally reciprocated, with Val usually offering more effective help to Lauren when she is in trouble. Throughout the series, numerous details have been given regarding Lauren's rather unusual tastes and sordid past, including robbing a laundromat after being convinced by her boyfriend and being a size-16 "big-boned and jelly-like" girl in fourth grade before going to a camp to lose weight. She first appears in season one and becomes a regular character in the rest of the series. Lauren is dramatic and boy crazy. She began working with Val in season 1. They soon become friends after a night out of drinking. She is bossy and impatient, and frequently comes off as highly self-centered, but deeply values her friendships with Val and Holly, offering them advice with mixed reception and equally mixed results. Lauren is dramatic and boy crazy. She began working with Val in season 1. They soon become friends after a night out of drinking. She is bossy and impatient, and frequently comes off as highly self-centered, but deeply values her friendships with Val and Holly, offering them advice with mixed reception and equally mixed results.

characters.name: Marcus
characters.description: MarcusBiographyFull NameMarcusAliasesMarcusStatusdating withLaurenGenderMaleRelativesVic Meladeo(best friend\brother figure)RomancesLauren (girlfriend)OccupationFire fighterSeries InformationSeasonsseason 3 or season 4Portrayed byMark WeilerMarcusis Vic's fire station buddy, who gets involved withLaurenand Lauren's boyfriend. He is depicted as understanding, dependable, and good-hearted.

characters.name: Officer Rubin
characters.description: Officer RubinBiographyFull NameOfficer RubinAliasesOfficerGenderMaleSeries InformationPortrayed byScott WeingerOfficer Rubinis a police officer, who interrogatesHollywhen she is mugged while she andVincewere arguing. He is brieflyTina's boyfriend and uses his authority to get a helicopter to help Tina andLaurenget toVal's wedding after he learns that the women are trapped at a spa. However, they part ways and Tina gets together withGary.

characters.name: Peter
characters.description: PeterBiographyGenderMaleOccupationHarper & Diggs ManagerSeries InformationPortrayed byStephen DunhamPeteris Val's boss at Harper & Diggs during the first half of the second season, taking over after Vic leaves. Unlike Vic, he displays a chauvinistic attitude, which upsets Val when he justifies his attitude by saying that Val does not understand how to conduct business with male clients. After quitting Harper & Diggs, Val ends up competing against him and her old company for clients. She has some mixed, somewhat romantic, feelings about him and is eventually pushed into going out on a date with him by Holly. However, when Val learns that Peter had an affair with his friend's wife, it seals Val's decision to not embark on a relationship with Peter. He disappears with the only explanation being he was going on a business trip to Europe, and is mentioned one last time during Val and Rick's first meeting at the Liberty Diner.

characters.name: Rick
characters.description: RickBiographyFull NameRichardAliasesRick(by everyone)Rick(portrayed by Edward Kerr) is Val's old boyfriend and fiancé. When she meets him again by chance, he is engaged to Julie, a woman he has very little in common with. Rick and Val's feelings for one another resurface and he leaves Julie on their wedding day to be with Val, whom he proposes to. However, shortly before his wedding to Val, Holly learns that Rick initiated a meeting with Julie, forcing Val to question Rick's intention on the day of their wedding. When he reveals he is afraid of commitment, their wedding is called off. Val later learns that he ended up marrying Julie after all; devastated, she spends a whole night drinking and marries Vic by accident. In the meantime, Lauren unwittingly pursues an online affair with Rick, which ends when he gets a heart attack while she was making love to him.

characters.name: Ricki
characters.description: RickiRicki(portrayed by Minka Kelly) is an old flame of Vince, whom he briefly dated after their reunion, much to the consternation of Holly, who was still in love with him. Holly constantly grates on Ricki's lack of common sense. Ricki's older brother, Jonathan, runs into Holly when she is stranded in Florida and unwittingly brings her to Vince when he goes to meet Ricki, who has been causing trouble for their family.

characters.name: Robyn Marquette
characters.description: Robyn MarquetteBiographyFull NameRobyn MarquetteAliasesRobyn(by everyone)Robyn Marquette(portrayed by Sara Erikson) is an ex-girlfriend of Vince who hires Vince as part of her real estate agency. She has a degree in Vassar and her father owns the real estate company. A manipulative and confident woman, she schemes to break up Holly and Vince in order to pursue Vince for herself. When Holly learns the truth, Vince does not believe her, which strains their relationship enough for them to break up. Vince eventually learns the truth, having been genuinely oblivious to Robyn's intentions, when he quits her company to in order to pursue a job offer in Chicago. However, he feels unable to reconcile with Holly, believing that his decision not to trust her regarding Robyn has damaged their relationship beyond repair.

characters.name: Tina Haven
characters.description: Tina HavenBiographyFull NameTina HavenAliasesTina(by everyone)StatusIn a relationship withGary ThorpeGenderFemaleRelativesJudith Haven (mother)RomancesGary Thorpe(boyfriend)OccupationStudentSeries InformationSeasons2•3•4Episodes59First2.03:"When Holly Met Tina"Last4.18:"Finally..."Portrayed byAllison MunnTina Havenis a recurring character inthe WBsitcomWhat I Like About You. She is portrayed byAllison Munn. She is an outspoken and blunt girl who eventually becomes Holly’s best friend and confidante along aside Holly’s sister Val. While she has a reputation for being promiscuous and sleeping with guys, she stresses she's "not a slut", but does not hesitate to use her attractiveness to get promotions, much to Holly's displeasure and disapproval. Her mother, Judith, a child psychologist and author, rarely gives Tina proper attention and frequently spends more time with her current boyfriend. Tina displays a talent for singing, as shown in a few episodes such as "Split Ends", "Jazz Night", and "Finally". Tina meets Holly when Val is trying to attract Tina's mother as a client for her PR firm and suggests it would be a good idea for Holly and Tina to meet. During their meeting, Tina is caught by Judith with a pregnancy test (the test turned out negative); Holly stuck up for Tina, claiming the test was hers. The two became best friends with a few bumps along the way. The Tyler sisters become Tina's neighbors after moving into the same building and Tina eventually welcomes Gary and Vince as her roommates. She is an outspoken and blunt girl who eventually becomes Holly’s best friend and confidante along aside Holly’s sister Val. While she has a reputation for being promiscuous and sleeping with guys, she stresses she's "not a slut", but does not hesitate to use her attractiveness to get promotions, much to Holly's displeasure and disapproval. Her mother, Judith, a child psychologist and author, rarely gives Tina proper attention and frequently spends more time with her current boyfriend. Tina displays a talent for singing, as shown in a few episodes such as "Split Ends", "Jazz Night", and "Finally".

characters.name: Todd
characters.description: ToddBiographyStatusSingleGenderMaleRomancesValerie Tyler(hooked up)OccupationPlumberSeries InformationPortrayed byLuke PerryToddis a plumber who went to Val's high school and had a one-night stand with her. Val becomes attracted to him again and briefly considers pursuing a relationship with him. However, after learning that Rick has married Julie, Val spends an entire night drinking. When she wakes up, she believes she has married Todd; however, this turns out to be a dream, though Val's relief quickly turns to shock when she wakes up and learns that she has actually married Vic.

characters.name: Valerie Tyler
characters.description: Val TylerBiographyFull NameValerie Kelly Meladeo(née Tyler)AliasesVal(by everyone)StatusMarried toVic MeladeoGenderFemaleRelativesUnnamed fatherHolly Tyler(younger sister/ward)Lauren(best friend\sister figure)unamed mother-in-lawunamed 3 brothers-in-lawRomancesVic Meladeo(husband)Jeff Campbell(ex-boyfriend)Rick ( Ex-boyfriend)Peter (Kissed)Occupationco-Manager of bakery withLaurenFounder of ValCo (formerly)PR Agent at Harper and Diggs (formerly)Series InformationSeasons1•2•3•4Episodes86First"The Pilot"Last"Finally..."Portrayed byJennie Garth Holly Tyler(younger sister/ward)Lauren(best friend\sister figure)unamed mother-in-lawunamed 3 brothers-in-law Rick ( Ex-boyfriend)Peter (Kissed) She has very high standards, and she expects Holly to live up to them. Val tries to be a good role model to Holly, but sometimes has trouble following her own rules. Although Val is a bit of a control freak, there's one thing she has trouble controlling (besides Holly) -- her own heart. Val craves stability, but she has a knack for changing her life on a whim, whether she's quitting her public relations job to run a bakery or marrying her old boss on a wild night in Atlantic City. She expects everything to run exactly as planned to the last detail and takes all her responsibilities seriously. As a result, she can become stressed and frustrated very easily, particularly by Holly's impulsive behavior. Despite her uptight nature, she and Holly are very close and Holly often encourages Val to take more risks, to varying degrees of success.

characters.personality_section: She has very high standards, and she expects Holly to live up to them. Val tries to be a good role model to Holly, but sometimes has trouble following her own rules. Although Val is a bit of a control freak, there's one thing she has trouble controlling (besides Holly) -- her own heart. Val craves stability, but she has a knack for changing her life on a whim, whether she's quitting her public relations job to run a bakery or marrying her old boss on a wild night in Atlantic City. She expects everything to run exactly as planned to the last detail and takes all her responsibilities seriously. As a result, she can become stressed and frustrated very easily, particularly by Holly's impulsive behavior. Despite her uptight nature, she and Holly are very close and Holly often encourages Val to take more risks, to varying degrees of success.

characters.name: Vic Meladeo
characters.description: Vic MeladeoBiographyFull NameVictor MeladeoAliasesVic(by everyone)StatusMarried toValerie TylerGenderMaleRelativesunamed motherunamed 3 brotherValerie Tyler(wife)Holly Tyler(sister-in-law)RomancesValerie Tyler(wife)Series InformationSeasons1•4Episodes20First"The Game"Last"Finally..."Portrayed byDan CorteseVic Meladeois a recurring character inthe WBsitcomWhat I Like About You. He is portrayed byDan Cortese. he is husband ofvaland he is sister-in-law toHolly Tylerand he is best friend\brother figure toMarcus Vic is introduced as the boss at Harper & Diggs, the public relations firm where Val and Lauren work. After Val breaks up with Jeff, she develops some unwanted feelings for Vic, which lead to the two almost kissing, news Holly accidentally spreads around the office. When Val talks to Vic about the kiss, they end up kissing for real, but a relationship never happens. He leaves the company, apparently for California, but at some point returned to become a firefighter in New York. Three years after leaving Harper & Diggs, Val is reunited with Vic in Atlantic City, where after a night of heavy drinking, they got married in a wedding chapel. Though Val is adamantly against being married to Vic, he refuses to annul their marriage because he feels that their relationship was meant to be and he sincerely loves her. Her feelings toward him gradually reciprocate and they finally kiss on Thanksgiving Day, the day that Val and Rick's wedding fell apart.

characters.name: Vince
characters.description: VinceBiographyFull NameVincentAliasesVinceStatusIn a relationship withHolly TylerGenderMaleRomancesHolly Tyler(girlfriend)Hooked up with many womenOccupationMail CourierSeries InformationSeasons2,3,4First2.1Last4.18 Hooked up with many women Vinceis a main character inthe WBsitcomWhat I Like About You. He is portrayed byNick Zano. Vince is a laid-back and attractive bike messenger who becomes friends with Holly towards the end of the first season and eventually becomes her love interest and boyfriend. He has taken care of himself since he was seventeen and lives in his own apartment, which he later shares withGary,Henry(briefly), andBen. Vince is on bad terms with his father and turned to his grandfather for support in their family; they shared a close relationship and Vince was upset when his grandfather died. While Vince is not very perceptive, he is dedicated to his friends and generally understanding. However, he is known for having many previous girlfriends, much to Holly's discomfort in their relationship.
